display_text: Juggernaut Aghanim's Scepter: Swiftslash — Enhances Omnislash with a quicker execution, transforming Juggernaut into a reliable burst damage dealer against key targets, particularly effective against squishy backline heroes.
search_text: Juggernaut Aghanim Scepter burst damage anti-backline squishy target quick execution

display_text: Juggernaut Aghanim's Shard: Increases Blade Fury radius and slows enemies by 35%. This upgrade counters kiting mechanics, making Juggernaut more effective in prolonged team fights and against mobile heroes.
search_text: Juggernaut Aghanim Shard anti-kiting slow blade fury team fight mobile heroes
